questions.question: Which Cloud/DevOps concept best matches: cloud model providing virtualized compute, storage, networking?
questions.explanation: IaaS is defined as: cloud model providing virtualized compute, storage, networking.

questions.question: What is the most accurate description of 'IaaS'?
options: release strategy gradually exposing new version to users
cloud model providing virtualized compute, storage, networking
orchestration platform for managing containerized workloads
ability to continue operation despite component failures
questions.explanation: IaaS refers to: cloud model providing virtualized compute, storage, networking.

questions.question: 'IaaS' belongs mainly to which Cloud/DevOps area?
questions.explanation: IaaS is mainly part of Cloud Service Models.

questions.question: Identify the correct Cloud/DevOps term-definition mapping.
options: Disaster Recovery -> cloud model providing virtualized compute, storage, networking
IaaS -> cloud model providing virtualized compute, storage, networking
Rolling Deployment -> cloud model providing virtualized compute, storage, networking
RPO -> cloud model providing virtualized compute, storage, networking
questions.explanation: Only 'IaaS -> cloud model providing virtualized compute, storage, networking' is correctly mapped.

questions.question: A Bank SO IT modernization requirement states: cloud model providing virtualized compute, storage, networking. Which concept should be selected?
questions.explanation: The requirement directly points to IaaS.

options: practice of frequent code integration with automated builds/tests
cloud model delivering complete software over internet
tracking request path across distributed services
ability to infer system state using telemetry data
questions.explanation: Tracing refers to: tracking request path across distributed services.

questions.question: 'Tracing' belongs mainly to which Cloud/DevOps area?
questions.explanation: Tracing is mainly part of Monitoring and Reliability.

questions.question: A Bank SO IT modernization requirement states: tracking request path across distributed services. Which concept should be selected?
questions.explanation: The requirement directly points to Tracing.
